completed_work: Automated system pulling billing data from all 9 AMs into one Master tab
Real-time validation and error detection with red flagging

recent_updates.summary: Phase 1 complete. Master file consolidation system is live and being used by all 9 AMs.

projects.summary_for_manager: Phase 1 of the Billing Optimization project is complete. An automated system now pulls billing data from all 9 Account Managers into one Master tab with real-time validation, error detection, and regional analytics. This is live and in use.

next_steps: Build automated script to detect campaigns with expired end dates
Set up Jira/Confluence alerts to traders

recent_updates.summary: Planned. Will build after Phase 1 is fully stable.

projects.summary_for_manager: Phase 2 is planned but not yet started. The goal is to build an automated script that detects campaigns with expired end dates and sends alerts to traders via Jira/Confluence, preventing campaigns from being forgotten at month-end.

next_steps: Design Salesforce vs IO comparison logic
Identify key fields to validate (budgets, dates, metrics)
projects.summary_for_manager: Phase 3 is planned but not yet started. The goal is a script that compares Salesforce data against the IO and flags discrepancies in budgets, dates, and metrics before they reach billing.

completed_work: Reviewed full codebase for performance improvements

recent_updates.summary: Margin calculator optimization complete. Performance and accuracy improvements delivered.

projects.summary_for_manager: The Margin Calculator optimization is complete. The existing codebase was reviewed and improved for performance and accuracy across omnichannel calculations.

projects.current_focus: Waiting on parameters list from Gabby to finalize conventions

blockers.description: Waiting on parameters list from Gabby
blockers.action_needed: Follow up with Gabby on parameters list

recent_updates.summary: Framework defined. Blocked on parameters list from Gabby before next steps can proceed.

projects.summary_for_manager: The Naming Conventions standardization project is 40% complete. The goal is to eliminate manual data entry errors by standardizing naming across all reporting systems. Currently waiting on a parameters list from Gabby to move forward.

projects.current_focus: Following up with Amale to adjust Planhat data for RFPs won vs lost
completed_work: Identified scope: January to present RFP data
Defined H1 won vs lost ratio metric
next_steps: Follow up with Amale on Planhat data adjustment
Calculate H1 won vs lost ratio
Set up weekly tracking system starting July

blockers.description: Need Amale to adjust Planhat data before analysis can begin

recent_updates.summary: Scope defined. Waiting on Amale to adjust Planhat data. Weekly tracking to start in July.

projects.summary_for_manager: The Planhat RFP Tracking project is 25% complete. The goal is to track RFPs won vs lost from January to present, calculate the H1 ratio, and implement weekly tracking from July onward. Currently waiting on Amale to adjust the Planhat data.

projects.current_focus: Initial audit of AMs share folder structure
next_steps: Audit all AMs share folders (campaigns by month)
Verify IOs, SS, and documentation are complete

recent_updates.summary: Just started. Audit scope defined, work in progress.

projects.summary_for_manager: The Share Folder Audit is just getting started (5% complete). The goal is to audit and organize all AMs' share folders by campaign and month, and verify that all IOs, screenshots, and documentation are complete for audit readiness.
